title: stachys recta var. sideritidoides
intro: Stachys recta var. sideritidoides, also known as wood betony or mountain betony, is a type of plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Stachys recta var. sideritidoides include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, ulcers, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and other sleep disorders. Stachys recta var. sideritidoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
